_comment: Customer/operator-facing C4-C9 on-site evidence worksheet. Copy this file outside Git, fill status/run ids/record ids after each live PoC step, then run: node scripts/ops/integration-k3wise-live-poc-evidence.mjs --packet <preflight-packet.json> --evidence <filled-template.json> --out-dir <evidence-dir>. Do not paste credentials, bearer headers, signed URLs, K3 session values, SQL connection strings, or passwords into evidence fields.

_instructions.owner: Implementation operator fills this with the customer K3/PLM administrator during live PoC execution.
_instructions.initialDecision: The checked-in template intentionally compiles to PARTIAL before it is filled.
safetyRules: C5/C6/C7 row counts must stay between 1 and 3 for the live PoC.
materialSaveOnly.autoSubmit and materialSaveOnly.autoAudit must remain false.
erpFeedback must prove staging writeback fields were updated.

_sections.C4: testConnection for PLM and K3 WISE; SQL Server only when the packet expects the SQL channel.
_sections.C5: Material dry-run with 1 to 3 preview rows.
_sections.C6: Material Save-only write with K3 response ids and MetaSheet feedback writeback.
_sections.C7: Optional BOM Save-only write when the packet contains a BOM pipeline.
_sections.C9: Rollback or cleanup rehearsal plus customer confirmation.

sqlServer.notes: Use skipped when the preflight packet does not include the K3 SQL Server channel.

materialDryRun.notes: Set status=pass only after the dry-run preview shows 1 to 3 material payloads.

materialSaveOnly.notes: Add K3 material response records only after Save-only write returns externalId or billNo.

erpFeedback.notes: Evidence must include updated staging rows or rowsUpdated>0 plus the required feedback fields.

deadLetterReplay.notes: Create one controlled failure, confirm dead-letter capture, fix it, then replay successfully.

bomPoC.notes: Required only when the preflight packet contains a BOM pipeline.

rollback.notes: Customer K3 administrator verifies test rows can be removed, disabled, or ignored by the agreed strategy.

customerConfirmation.notes: Customer owner confirms the C4-C9 evidence package is acceptable for PoC signoff.
